settings.intro: Shop real kemp jewellery collections for Bharatanatyam, Kuchipudi, arangetram ceremonies, senior stage performances and premium classical styling.
settings.guide_heading: Choose real kemp by performance use, set role and care needs
settings.guide_body: Real kemp is the premium Golden Collections dance range for arangetram, senior stage performances and long-term classical use. Start with the full set or main necklace path, then match mattal, headset, vaddanam and earrings by finish, Kemp/Kempu stone colour, scale and stage visibility. Store pieces dry, avoid perfume and water, and pack heavier premium pieces separately after performance.
